    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.mvc
    Lightweight WebMVC Controller annotation-based API Gateway via ProxyExchange.
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.mvc.config
    Configuration classes for WebMVC ProxyExchange.
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.route
    TODO: package javadoc.
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.route.builder
     
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.sample
     
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc
    Base package that contains autoconfiguration for the Gateway Server WebMVC.
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.common
    Package that contains commons shared classes and interfaces.
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.config
    Package that contains implementation of creating RouterFunctions from external configuration.
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.filter
    Package that contains implementations of FilterFunctions.
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.handler
    Package that contains advanced classes for adapting WebMVC.fn to an API Gateway.
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.invoke
    Interfaces and classes relating to invoking operation methods.
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.invoke.convert
    Converter support for configuration based RouterFunctions, Filters and Predicates.
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.invoke.reflect
    Reflection support for loading RouterFunctions from configuration.
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.predicate
    Package that contains RequestPredicate implementations.
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.support
     
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.support
     
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.support.config
     
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.support.ipresolver
     
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.support.tagsprovider
     
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.tests.grpc
     
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.tests.http2
     
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.tests.httpclient
     
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.webflux
    Lightweight WebFlux Controller annotation-based API Gateway via ProxyExchange.
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway.webflux.config
    Configuration classes for WebFlux ProxyExchange.
